note: NightF BStableSideLift: preserve NightB-like pitch height across still/sagittal movement, hard-block inward roll like NightD, and gate shoulder_roll penalty off during lateral commands so signed outward roll can open further. Command: Night F：以 NightB 的静止/走路 pitch 姿态为基准；继承 D 的禁止内收 roll 限位；侧移时 roll 外展且 shoulder_roll 软限位惩罚按 lateral gate 淡出，侧移 pitch 比 NightB 略抬。
